name: How much money can I get for work-related asthma that forced me to quit?
description: Medical, 2/3 wages, permanent disability pay—varies by case severity, often $50K+[2].

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for work-related asthma that forced me to quit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, 2/3 wages, permanent disability pay—varies by case severity, often $50K+[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: Compensation includes medical bills, lost wages (often 2/3 of average weekly pay), and permanent disability ratings—potentially $50K+ depending on severity and state caps. Workers' comp for respiratory claims values long-term care and impairment, unlike lawsuits barring pain/suffering[2][4]. Utah has no daily max but overall limits. - Factors: exposure proof, doctor impairment rating, missed work. - Settlements average higher with strong evidence. Get a rating exam, negotiate settlement, and use a lawyer to maximize value without lowball offers.
